template_data.headline_html: What changes when you stop going it alone.
template_data.image_prompt: Before/after split infographic. Left panel dark navy, bold label 'BEFORE' with red X icon. Illustrated professional alone at desk surrounded by rejected document folders. Three short labels below: 'NO PAST PERF', 'EVERY BID LOST', 'COMMERCIAL ONLY'. Right panel cream, bold label 'AFTER' with green checkmark. Illustrated two professionals in suits shaking hands. Three short labels: 'FIRST AWARD', 'RECORD BUILT', 'NOW THE PRIME'. Bold headline spanning top: 'THE DOOR THAT TEAMING OPENS.' Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
